result: Data cleaning completed successfully. The R script loaded 6 wave files (wave_one, wave_four, wave_six, wave_seven, ns8_2015, ns9_2022), merged them by NSID using full_join, and created harmonized sexual orientation variables (sori19, sori20, sori25, sori32) with standardized missing value codes. The cleaned dataset has been saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv containing NSID and the four derived sexual orientation variables.
